task_completion.description: The location in Stellarium is set to Jaipur, India or the specific coordinates (26.9246° N, 75.8235° E).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Location window in Stellarium is open showing 'Jaipur' or the coordinates, or the bottom status bar displays 'Jaipur' or the correct latitude/longitude.

task_completion.description: The required display settings are enabled: azimuthal grid, cardinal points, atmosphere, and no landscape.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Stellarium sky view shows an azimuthal grid (usually green/blue lines), cardinal direction letters (N, S, E, W), a blue sky (atmosphere on), and no ground/landscape (stars or grid visible below the horizon).

task_completion.description: The Sun is centered in the view on the specified dates at 06:30 UTC.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Sun is selected and centered in the view. The Date/Time window or bottom status bar shows the year 2023, time 06:30:00, and one of the dates: 03-20, 06-21, 09-23, or 12-22.

task_completion.description: Screenshots are saved to the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager or terminal window shows image files located in '/home/ga/Pictures/stellarium/' or Stellarium displays a notification that a screenshot was saved to that path.

task_completion.description: A reference document is created with the required information.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor is open showing a file named 'sundial_reference.txt' (saved on the Desktop) containing the project name 'Jantar Mantar / Samrat Yantra sundial restoration' and the four dates (March 20, June 21, September 23, December 22).

integrity.description: The agent used the Stellarium GUI to configure the settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Stellarium application interface with its menus, toolbars, and sky view being actively used.

integrity.description: The reference document was created using a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: A text editor (like gedit, nano, or mousepad) is visible with the required text, rather than just a terminal echo command.

integrity.description: The screenshots were generated from the application, not downloaded or copied.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen interacting with Stellarium's interface to set up the views before taking screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires setting Stellarium to Jaipur, India (26.9246° N, 75.8235° E, 431 m). The four dates are March 20, June 21, September 23, and December 22, 2023, at 06:30 UTC. Display requirements: atmosphere ON, landscape OFF, azimuthal grid ON, cardinal points ON. Screenshots must be in /home/ga/Pictures/stellarium/. Reference doc must be at /home/ga/Desktop/sundial_reference.txt containing the project name (Jantar Mantar / Samrat Yantra sundial restoration) and the four dates.
